creator: minotaur@crete.org.ua
text:
When trying to play AAC+ stream, for example http://gr-relay-3.gaduradio.pl/19,
xmms begins to buffer stream infinitely and does not play it.

vlc plays it without problems.

How-To-Repeat: Install multimedia/xmms and audio/xmms-faad.
Add http://gr-relay-3.gaduradio.pl/19 to playlist and try to play it.
